query:
ALTER TABLE feedbackReplies ADD COLUMN videoUrl varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL;
ALTER TABLE feedbackReplies ADD COLUMN readByUser boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
ALTER TABLE broadcasts ADD COLUMN videoUrl varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS broadcastReads (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  broadcastId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  isRead boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  isDeleted boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  readAt timestamp NULL,
  deletedAt timestamp NULL,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT broadcastReads_id PRIMARY KEY(id),
  CONSTRAINT broadcastReads_broadcastId_fk FOREIGN KEY (broadcastId) REFERENCES broadcasts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT broadcastReads_userId_fk FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX broadcastReads_broadcastUser_idx (broadcastId, userId),
  INDEX broadcastReads_userId_idx (userId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute ALTER TABLE feedbackReplies ADD COLUMN videoUrl varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL;
ALTER TABLE feedbackReplies ADD COLUMN readByUser boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
ALTER TABLE broadcasts ADD COLUMN videoUrl varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS broadcastReads (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  broadcastId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  isRead boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  isDeleted boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  readAt timestamp NULL,
  deletedAt timestamp NULL,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT broadcastReads_id PRIMARY KEY(id),
  CONSTRAINT broadcastReads_broadcastId_fk FOREIGN KEY (broadcastId) REFERENCES broadcasts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT broadcastReads_userId_fk FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX broadcastReads_broadcastUser_idx (broadcastId, userId),
  INDEX broadcastReads_userId_idx (userId)
);
